column1: # BM25 weight-tuning golden query set (chunk S2) — TIER 2: PINNED-BUT-REVIEWABLE, explicitly
# NOT FROZEN (§A6). These pins hold for the embedded engine (FTS5, unicode61 remove_diacritics 1)
# with the Fts5SearchProvider column weights (title 10, heading 5, body 1, tags 2, aliases 2,
# owner 2) on the pinned sqlite-jdbc version. A deliberate weight change or SQLite bump may move
# them — that is a REVIEWABLE regeneration event (re-run the queries, eyeball each top-1 for
# sensibleness, transcribe), never a forever break. NO CJK-sensitive terms (§A6 tokenizer
# guidance — CJK behavior is asserted in the per-engine-tagged trigram test instead).
# What the set proves (S2 acceptance): a TITLE match beats a body mention (handbook, welcome,
# monitoring); a HEADING match beats body text (rollback, prerequisites, postmortems, ingress);
# TAG/ALIAS hits rank sensibly (quickstart, oncall, runbook); multi-token + prefix queries land
